en-US.title: Superset Mobile
en-US.subtitle: Run AI agents from anywhere
en-US.description:
Superset lets you run and manage AI coding agents from anywhere. Kick off tasks, review progress, and chat with agents working across your projects — all from your phone.

- Start and monitor agent sessions in isolated workspaces
- Chat with agents and attach images to your messages
- Track tasks and pull requests across your organization
- Stay in sync with your team in real time

review.notes: Sign in requires a GitHub or Google account. TODO: provide a demo account before App Store review.
